S

setData(int, int, boolean) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.EndController
Receives and injects the completed match data into the view.
showErrorMessage() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Shows an error message in FeedBackLabel with red text.
showLessTwoSeconds(int, int) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Shows wordTwoLabel when the level is a multiple of 5 and the remaining time is greater than 2 seconds.
showSuccesMessage() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Shows a success message in FeedBackLabel with green text.
start(Runnable, Runnable) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.Time
Starts the countdown of the current level.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.Main
JavaFX entry point.
StartController - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.controller
Controller for the start screen of "Escritura RÃ¡pida".
StartController() - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.StartController
 
StartStage - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.view
Start window of the "Escritura RÃ¡pida" application.
StartStage() - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.view.StartStage
Constructor that loads the FXML, configures the scene, title, window icon and displays it to the user.
stop() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.Time
Stops the level countdown if it is running.
stopSwitchColor() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.Time
Stops the timer flicker animation if it is running.
stopTotalSeconds() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.Time
Stops the total match count if it is running.
switchColor(Runnable, Runnable) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.Time
Starts the timer flicker animation when time is critical.
